name: Radiation_Therapy
display_fullname: Stalker Defense Radiation Armor Radiation Therapy
display_help:
You channel a tremendous amount of radiation into a barrier around you. For a short time you will have a strong absorption shield in addition to a regeneration and recovery buff.


Notes: This power has adaptive recharge. It has a base recharge of 15 seconds and each affected foe will increase the recharge by a varying amount. First target adds 12 seconds for a maximum total of 60 seconds.
display_short_help: PBAoE, DMG(Energy), DoT(Toxic), Foe -Regen, Self +HP, +End, Res(-Regen)
